title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXXIII. Relics.
content:
What's the news of the day,
        Good neighbour, I pray?
        They say the balloon
        Is gone up to the moon.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DCXXIII. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
